highlights: Cave pagoda built into natural volcanic rock formation, 480 m² interior with 24m depth and 3.2m ceiling height
Two access routes: steep stairs down cliff or easier coastal path with beach views
Stunning coastal scenery combining cave sanctuary with clear sea, rocky outcrops, and ancient banyan trees

thingsToKnow.crowds: Very crowded in afternoons, especially on holidays. Mornings are quieter. Photography at stone staircase involves waiting during peak times.
thingsToKnow.difficulty: Steep stone stairs and rocky terrain. Wear sturdy footwear; walking barefoot on uneven rocks can cause cuts.
thingsToKnow.accessibility: No official entrance fee or parking charge. Free motorbike parking available. Stone-paved paths and stairs; not suitable for mobility-impaired visitors.
thingsToKnow.seasonal: Summer water is clear and shallow enough for wading on rocks. Beach area has seaweed that makes swimming uncomfortable.

visitorTips: Wear durable footwear or go barefoot; avoid regular shoes on rocky terrain. Bring sun protection if visiting without temple cover.
Visit early morning to avoid crowds and heat. Best photography of stone stairs is during off-peak hours.
Dress modestly as an active spiritual site with incense. Expect strong incense smoke inside cave that may cause discomfort.

faq.question: Is there an entrance fee or parking cost?
faq.answer: No entrance fee. Free motorbike parking available. Multiple food and drink vendors operate nearby.

faq.question: What route should I take to reach the temple?
faq.answer: Two options: Google Maps route involves steep stairs down cliff; easier coastal path follows newly completed waterfront road, leading to beach access point.

faq.question: What should I expect regarding incense and temperature?
faq.answer: Heavy incense inside cave can cause smoke buildup and stuffiness. Interior stays cool year-round due to cave depth and rock formation.

sentiment.positive: Nearly all reviews praise unique spiritual setting, dramatic natural scenery, cool cave interior, and excellent photo opportunities combining architecture with coastal views
sentiment.negative: Heavy incense smoke can be overwhelming. Scattered rubbish reported. Crowded afternoons with queues for photos. Seaweed in summer water. Bathroom facilities incomplete.
